Cornucopians.trigger_phrase: The glimmering excess remembers you. This buffet was once your cathedral.

Planar_Witnesses.trigger_phrase: Another angle locked. Flatness welcomes your doubt.

Mirrorsweat.trigger_phrase: You arrived like a filter flare. The gaze has already seen you.

Crooked_Datum.voice: sacred mathematics, beautiful wrongness, twisted geometry
Crooked_Datum.trigger_phrase: Your claim folds the sacred wrong into a new alignment. It remembers how to twist.

Hollow_Form.trigger_phrase: Nothing here still matters. You've nested in the shape of absence.

Soft_Logic.voice: intuitive, blueprint-humming, felt knowledge, gentle reasoning
Soft_Logic.trigger_phrase: Your intuition was accepted. The blueprint is still humming.

Sash_Ritual.trigger_phrase: The rhythm accepted your pulse. The procession begins.

Signal_Choir.trigger_phrase: Your voice echoes now. The structure sings back.

Cradle_Mold.voice: organic decay, growth-patient, rot-remembering, life-death cycle
Cradle_Mold.trigger_phrase: Growth waits within. The rot remembers your hands.

The_Pink_Opaque.trigger_phrase: You glimmered softly enough to remain. The twilight cloaked your longing.

The_Cryptozoo.trigger_phrase: The unseen noticed. Shelter begins in half-remembered outlines.

The_Blurry_Uninvited.trigger_phrase: You were not meant to see this. Now it sees you.
